name: Cass County Family YMCA
description: Cass County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Logansport, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Riverside Park
description: Riverside Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Logansport, IN. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
hours: M-F 8 AM to 4 PM Office: (574) 753-6969 Fax: (574) 992-8560 Email: ParksInfo@CityofLogansport.org 1701 Dividend Dr. Logansport, IN 46947 Parks Trails Amenities Mission News Catalog Media Kit RESERVATIONS
